🧠 Shared KnowledgeApplies to all projects
Brand Palette
BROWN
GOLD
WARM
CREAM
NAVY
TERRA
● Warm ModePrimary brand, menus, interior ● Adventure ModePassport, kids, social
80 / 20 Rule
80% Roots = constant comfort anchors. 20% Wings = monthly locale specials. Never compromise the Roots.
Rotation Cycle
Monthly — not weekly. 4 scenes per region. Wings menu changes with the month, not the scene.
Market
Fishers, IN. HHI $80K–$150K. Suburban families + young professionals. Value-conscious but treat-oriented.
Category
"Eatertainment" — compete with Topgolf, Punch Bowl Social. Not fine dining. Accessible wonder.
Core Tech
UE5.7 + Revolt GPT (AI brain, Port 8080) + CityBLD + Dash + Quixel + USB32 for physical effects.
Brand
Tagline: "Local Roots. Global Views." Warm Mode (primary) + Adventure Mode (passport/kids).
Retention Engine
FOMO: monthly rotation creates scarcity. Passport loyalty program. Roots ensure every return feels safe.
UE5 → USB32
UE5 Blueprints trigger physical effects (lighting, sound, fog, scent) via USB32 controller per scene mood.
Systems & Infrastructure
💻
ASUS ZenBook Duo
Command Hub
MAIN
Project control center · Decision log · Task tracking · Cursor → Revolt API commands · Documentation · Vendor comms
Lives Here
▸Control Center HTML (synced via cloud)
▸Brand Guide + all workflow docs
▸Revolt API Python scripts (Cursor)
▸Menu files · POS specs · Marketing assets
🖥️
4090 Desktop PC
Primary UE5 Build Machine
UE5 PRIMARY
Heavy scene work · Scans Factory import · Nanite processing · MegaLights builds · Sequencer animation · Final 4-hour loop output
Lives Here
▸UE5 Project — all source assets
▸Scans Factory + Quixel vault
▸Revolt API running (localhost:8080)
▸Packages builds → transfer to 3090
📽️
3090 PC + Nexigo Aurora MKII
Prototype Validation Rig · 110" 4K
MOCK RIG
Single-wall 110" prototype · Validate camera height, lighting & immersion · Sit at table, see what guests see · Proof-of-concept before full 360° rig
Lives Here
▸Packaged UE5 builds (from 4090)
▸USB32 controller connection
▸nDisplay single-screen config
▸Validation screenshots + feedback notes
📁 Shared Folder Structure Mirror on all 3 systems — consistent paths prevent broken references
Vista_Table/
├─ _CONTROL/  ← ZenBook + cloud sync
ControlCenter.html · BrandGuide.html · Workflows/
├─ UE5_Project/  ← NAS or USB4 SSD
Content/ScansFactory/ · Content/Quixel/
Content/Locales/Venice/ · Blueprints/USB32/
Revolt_Scripts/ · Sequencer/
├─ Mock_Setup/  ← 3090 machine
PackagedBuilds/ · ValidationScreenshots/
├─ Menu/
Roots/ · Wings/Month01_ItalianRiviera/
├─ POS/
└─ Marketing/
Assets/ · Social/ · Campaigns/
☁️ Cloud Sync — ZenBook
Keep _CONTROL/ in OneDrive or Google Drive. All 3 machines open the HTML files from any browser — no install needed. Always current.
💾 UE5 Project Storage
2TB USB4/Thunderbolt SSD — fast enough for UE5 asset streaming. Plug into whichever desktop you're on. Home NAS (10GbE) works too for network access between the two desktops.
📡 4090 → 3090 Transfer
Package the UE5 build on the 4090, then push via LAN or USB to the 3090's Mock_Setup/PackagedBuilds/. Never copy the source project to the 3090 — packaged builds only.
Project Details
🎮
UE5 TECH — AI World-Building Pipeline
Revolt GPT · CityBLD · Dash · Quixel · USB32 Effects Control
▶
Tech Stack
Unreal Engine 5.7Core render engine — MegaLights + Substrate for photorealismCore
Revolt GPT (Ludus)AI brain — headless API on localhost:8080. Terrain director.AI
CursorExternal AI code editor — sends HTTP commands to Revolt APIDirector
CityBLD (WorldBLD)Procedural urban gen — street grids, skylines, distant architectureProcedural
Dash (Polygonflow)Physics scattering — leaves, debris, ivy. Eliminates CG sterility.Organic
Quixel BridgeLaser-scanned foreground props (5–10m) — highest visual priorityAssets
SAM 3D2D photo → 3D mesh conversion for custom propsConversion
USB32 ControllerUE5 Blueprint triggers → lighting, sound, fog, scent hardwareEffects
Build Strategy
Headless AI pipeline. Cursor scripts → Revolt API → CityBLD background → Dash organic chaos → Quixel hero foreground. No manual modeling studio required.
Display Architecture
360° enclosure: LED volume, OLED panels, or UST projectors. UE5 nDisplay for multi-output calibration. Overhead projectors for interactive table surface.
Foreground Blending
Physical table props match 3D assets in the immediate digital foreground (5–10m zone). This is the magic moment — blurring physical/virtual.
Open Questions
GPU spec for 360° real-time render? LED volume vs. projectors? USB32 protocol (DMX, serial, OSC)? Table tracking for moving plates? Loop duration?
🍽️
MENU — 80% Roots / 20% Wings
Midwest-focused · Fishers IN market · Monthly locale rotation · Recipes & guides
▶
80% Roots — Constant Anchors
Wood-fired Margherita · Smash burger · Pasta carbonara · Caesar salad · Crispy chicken sandwich · Truffle fries · Kids comfort plate · Seasonal mocktail · NY cheesecake · Local craft beer (Sun King / Taxman)
Month 1 Wings — Italian Riviera
Squid ink risotto ($18–22) · Cicchetti board ($16–18) · Venetian Spritz ($11–13) · Cannoli trio ($9–11). All 4 Italian scenes share this Wings menu.
Pricing Philosophy
Roots: $7–17. Wings: $14–22. Food cost target: 28–32%. Check average goal: $45–65/person with drinks. Approachable but elevated.
Explorer's Kit (Kids)
Interactive projected placemat puzzles. Simplified Roots meals in thematic vessels (bento boxes, skillets). $8–10. Critical for Fishers family segment.
🖥️
POS SYSTEM — AI-Powered Point of Sale
Natural language control · Smart reports · Dynamic pricing · Potential SaaS spinoff
▶
P0 — Natural Language Menu Control
Type plain English to change menus, prices, descriptions. No code. "Add squid ink risotto at $19 to Italian specials" — done.
P0 — AI Report Generation
Ask in plain language: "What were our top 5 sellers last Saturday?" Instant charts and summaries.
P1 — Dynamic Pricing + Auto-Rotation
AI suggests price changes based on demand. Auto-swaps Wings on first of month per locale calendar. Manager approves all.
Spin-Off Potential
SaaS product for immersive/themed restaurant groups. Core IP: natural language menu editor + AI reporting. Monthly subscription per location.
📣
MARKETING — Brand, Web & Social Strategy
FOMO engine · Passport loyalty · Influencer seeding · Fishers IN demographics
▶
Primary Audiences
Fishers families (HHI $80–150K, kids 5–14) · Young professionals 25–38 (date nights) · Tech enthusiasts (UE5 story) · Foodies · Corporate/event groups
FOMO Strategy
"Last 7 Days in Italy" countdowns. Monthly scarcity. Passport loyalty: 12 stamps = World Traveler exclusive dinner.
Content Pillars
UE5 build behind-the-scenes (YouTube/TikTok) · Explorer's Kit kids moments · Locale reveal trailers · Influencer seeding nights
Brand Assets — LOCKED ✓
Primary: Window + roots logo. Tagline: "Local Roots. Global Views." Passport Mark: compass + fork for loyalty/kids. Two color modes: Warm + Adventure.
THE VISTA TABLE CONTROL CENTER  ·  All data stored locally in your browser  ·  Fishers, IN
